ddt:Target.Name: BVR_on_can_X62_vdraft
ddt:Target.Description:
Magneti Marelli robotized Gearbox for vehicle X62
Vdraft3 31/10/2008
Author: C.Morell (B2I Automotive) e mail: Christophe.morell@B2i-Automotive.fr Tel : 01 51 71 52 52
Modification : Correction erreur d'échelle sur la variable "Engine speed from CAN" Ajout de la trame étude $21$A4.

Data.Name: Number cycle with current fault
Data.Comment: nombre de cycle avec défaut présent

Data.Name: Number cycle with memory fault
Data.Comment: nombre de cycle avec le défaut mémorisé

Item.Text: assembly line testing and after-sales session

Data.Name: Memory Size
Data.Comment: the number of bytes to be read according to the address specified on the request.

Item.Text: 2nd phase clutch purge cycle start command
Hydraulic pressure group purge cycle start command
Limp home mode gearbox deblocking command
2eme phase clutch purge cycle start command
Hydraulic pressure group purge cycle start command
Limp home mode gearbox deblocking command

Data.Name: Selection position sensor
Data.Description: {\rtf1\ansi\deff0\deftab720{\fonttbl{\f0\fnil MS Sans Serif;}{\f1\fnil\fcharset2 Symbol;}{\f2\fswiss\fprq2 System;}{\f3\fnil\fprq2 MS Sans Serif;}} {\colortbl\red0\green0\blue0;} \deflang1036\pard\plain\f0\fs17 b7-------------------------------------------\tab Valeur standard ou syst\'e8me \par b6---------------------------------------\tab Panne m\'e9moris\'e9e \par b5----------------------------------\tab Panne pr\'e9sente \par \tab b4b3b2b1b0-----------\tab Type de d\'e9faut \par \par \tab b4 b3 b2 b1 b0 \par \par 0\tab 0 0 0 0 0 \tab n.u. \par 1\tab 0 0 0 0 1 \tab CO \par 2\tab 0 0 0 1 0 \tab CC- \par 3\tab 0 0 0 1 1 \tab CC+ \par 4\tab 0 0 1 0 0 \tab Param. en but\'e9e min. \par 5\tab 0 0 1 0 1 \tab Param. en but\'e9e Max. \par 6\tab 0 0 1 1 0 \tab Incoh\'e9rence \par 7\tab 0 0 1 1 1 \tab Pas de signal \par 8\tab 0 1 0 0 0 \tab En dessous du seuil min. \par 9\tab 0 1 0 0 1 \tab Au dessus du seuil Max. \par 10\tab 0 1 0 1 0 \tab Niveau bas permanent \par 11\tab 0 1 0 1 1 \tab Niveau haut permanent \par 12\tab 0 1 1 0 0 \tab Lignes en CC \par 13\tab 0 1 1 0 1 \tab Anomalie \'e9lectronique interne \par \par }

Data.Name: Pressure sensor
Data.Description: {\rtf1\ansi\deff0\deftab720{\fonttbl{\f0\fnil MS Sans Serif;}{\f1\fnil\fcharset2 Symbol;}{\f2\fswiss\fprq2 System;}{\f3\fnil\fprq2 MS Sans Serif;}} {\colortbl\red0\green0\blue0;} \deflang1036\pard\plain\f0\fs17 b7-------------------------------------------\tab Valeur standard ou syst\'e8me \par b6---------------------------------------\tab Panne m\'e9moris\'e9e \par b5----------------------------------\tab Panne pr\'e9sente \par \tab b4b3b2b1b0-----------\tab Type de d\'e9faut \par \par \tab b4 b3 b2 b1 b0 \par \par 0\tab 0 0 0 0 0 \tab n.u. \par 1\tab 0 0 0 0 1 \tab CO \par 2\tab 0 0 0 1 0 \tab CC- \par 3\tab 0 0 0 1 1 \tab CC+ \par 4\tab 0 0 1 0 0 \tab Param. en but\'e9e min. \par 5\tab 0 0 1 0 1 \tab Param. en but\'e9e Max. \par 6\tab 0 0 1 1 0 \tab Incoh\'e9rence \par 7\tab 0 0 1 1 1 \tab Pas de signal \par 8\tab 0 1 0 0 0 \tab En dessous du seuil min. \par 9\tab 0 1 0 0 1 \tab Au dessus du seuil Max. \par 10\tab 0 1 0 1 0 \tab Niveau bas permanent \par 11\tab 0 1 0 1 1 \tab Niveau haut permanent \par 12\tab 0 1 1 0 0 \tab Lignes en CC \par 13\tab 0 1 1 0 1 \tab Anomalie \'e9lectronique interne \par \pard\plain\f0\fs17 \par }

Data.Name: Output Permanent Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Data.Name: Clutch position sensor
Data.Description: {\rtf1\ansi\deff0\deftab720{\fonttbl{\f0\fnil MS Sans Serif;}{\f1\fnil\fcharset2 Symbol;}{\f2\fswiss\fprq2 System;}{\f3\fnil\fprq2 MS Sans Serif;}} {\colortbl\red0\green0\blue0;} \deflang1036\pard\plain\f0\fs17 b7-------------------------------------------\tab Valeur standard ou syst\'e8me \par b6---------------------------------------\tab Panne m\'e9moris\'e9e \par b5----------------------------------\tab Panne pr\'e9sente \par \tab b4b3b2b1b0-----------\tab Type de d\'e9faut \par \par \tab b4 b3 b2 b1 b0 \par \par 0\tab 0 0 0 0 0 \tab n.u. \par 1\tab 0 0 0 0 1 \tab CO \par 2\tab 0 0 0 1 0 \tab CC- \par 3\tab 0 0 0 1 1 \tab CC+ \par 4\tab 0 0 1 0 0 \tab Param. en but\'e9e min. \par 5\tab 0 0 1 0 1 \tab Param. en but\'e9e Max. \par 6\tab 0 0 1 1 0 \tab Incoh\'e9rence \par 7\tab 0 0 1 1 1 \tab Pas de signal \par 8\tab 0 1 0 0 0 \tab En dessous du seuil min. \par 9\tab 0 1 0 0 1 \tab Au dessus du seuil Max. \par 10\tab 0 1 0 1 0 \tab Niveau bas permanent \par 11\tab 0 1 0 1 1 \tab Niveau haut permanent \par 12\tab 0 1 1 0 0 \tab Lignes en CC \par 13\tab 0 1 1 0 1 \tab Anomalie \'e9lectronique interne \par \pard\plain\f0\fs17 \par }

Data.Name: Gear position sensor
Data.Description: {\rtf1\ansi\deff0\deftab720{\fonttbl{\f0\fnil MS Sans Serif;}{\f1\fnil\fcharset2 Symbol;}{\f2\fswiss\fprq2 System;}{\f3\fnil\fprq2 MS Sans Serif;}} {\colortbl\red0\green0\blue0;} \deflang1036\pard\plain\f0\fs17 b7-------------------------------------------\tab Valeur standard ou syst\'e8me \par b6---------------------------------------\tab Panne m\'e9moris\'e9e \par b5----------------------------------\tab Panne pr\'e9sente \par \tab b4b3b2b1b0-----------\tab Type de d\'e9faut \par \par \tab b4 b3 b2 b1 b0 \par \par 0\tab 0 0 0 0 0 \tab n.u. \par 1\tab 0 0 0 0 1 \tab CO \par 2\tab 0 0 0 1 0 \tab CC- \par 3\tab 0 0 0 1 1 \tab CC+ \par 4\tab 0 0 1 0 0 \tab Param. en but\'e9e min. \par 5\tab 0 0 1 0 1 \tab Param. en but\'e9e Max. \par 6\tab 0 0 1 1 0 \tab Incoh\'e9rence \par 7\tab 0 0 1 1 1 \tab Pas de signal \par 8\tab 0 1 0 0 0 \tab En dessous du seuil min. \par 9\tab 0 1 0 0 1 \tab Au dessus du seuil Max. \par 10\tab 0 1 0 1 0 \tab Niveau bas permanent \par 11\tab 0 1 0 1 1 \tab Niveau haut permanent \par 12\tab 0 1 1 0 0 \tab Lignes en CC \par 13\tab 0 1 1 0 1 \tab Anomalie \'e9lectronique interne \par \par }

Data.Name: Memorized inputs states
Data.Description: {\rtf1\ansi\ansicpg1252\deff0\deftab720{\fonttbl{\f0\fswiss MS Sans Serif;}{\f1\froman\fcharset2 Symbol;}{\f2\fswiss MS Sans Serif;}} {\colortbl\red0\green0\blue0;} \deflang1036\pard\plain\f2\fs17 Etats des entr\'e9es m\'e9moris\'e9es tant que +APC pr\'e9sent \par \par bit 7 = 1, Vitesse v\'e9hicule vue > 40 km/h \par bit 6 = 1, Contact frein \'e0 fermeture ON \par bit 5 = 1, Contact porte ON \par bit 4 = 1, Contact frein \'e0 main (CAN) ON \par bit 3 = 1, Mode auto \par bit 2 = 1, Contact faible adh\'e9rence ON \par bit 1 = 1, Position pied \'e0 fond \par bit 0 = 1, Position pied lev\'e9 \par }

Data.Name: Memorized inputs states 2
Data.Description: {\rtf1\ansi\ansicpg1252\deff0\deftab720{\fonttbl{\f0\fswiss MS Sans Serif;}{\f1\froman\fcharset2 Symbol;}{\f2\fswiss MS Sans Serif;}} {\colortbl\red0\green0\blue0;} \deflang1036\pard\plain\f2\fs17 Etats des entr\'e9es m\'e9moris\'e9es tant que +APC pr\'e9sent \par \par bit 7 = 1, Vitesse v\'e9hicule vue > 40 km/h \par bit 6 = 1, Contact frein \'e0 fermeture ON \par bit 5 = 1, Contact porte ON \par bit 4 = 1, Contact frein \'e0 main (CAN) ON \par bit 3 = 1, Mode auto \par bit 2 = 1, Contact faible adh\'e9rence ON \par bit 1 = 1, Position pied \'e0 fond \par bit 0 = 1, Position pied lev\'e9 \par }

Data.Name: Info CAN Right back wheel speed.
Info CAN Left back wheel speed.
Info CAN Right front wheel speed.
Info CAN Left front wheel speed.
CAN network.
Data.Description: {\rtf1\ansi\deff0\deftab720{\fonttbl{\f0\fnil MS Sans Serif;}{\f1\fnil\fcharset2 Symbol;}{\f2\fswiss\fprq2 System;}{\f3\fnil\fprq2 MS Sans Serif;}} {\colortbl\red0\green0\blue0;} \deflang1036\pard\plain\f0\fs17 b7-------------------------------------------\tab Valeur standard ou syst\'e8me \par b6---------------------------------------\tab Panne m\'e9moris\'e9e \par b5----------------------------------\tab Panne pr\'e9sente \par \tab b4b3b2b1b0-----------\tab Type de d\'e9faut \par \par \tab b4 b3 b2 b1 b0 \par \par 0\tab 0 0 0 0 0 \tab n.u. \par 1\tab 0 0 0 0 1 \tab CO \par 2\tab 0 0 0 1 0 \tab CC- \par 3\tab 0 0 0 1 1 \tab CC+ \par 4\tab 0 0 1 0 0 \tab Param. en but\'e9e min. \par 5\tab 0 0 1 0 1 \tab Param. en but\'e9e Max. \par 6\tab 0 0 1 1 0 \tab Incoh\'e9rence \par 7\tab 0 0 1 1 1 \tab Pas de signal \par 8\tab 0 1 0 0 0 \tab En dessous du seuil min. \par 9\tab 0 1 0 0 1 \tab Au dessus du seuil Max. \par 10\tab 0 1 0 1 0 \tab Niveau bas permanent \par 11\tab 0 1 0 1 1 \tab Niveau haut permanent \par 12\tab 0 1 1 0 0 \tab Lignes en CC \par 13\tab 0 1 1 0 1 \tab Anomalie \'e9lectronique interne \par \pard\plain\f0\fs17 \par }

Item.Text: Memorized failure - short circuit to ground
Memorized failure - Parameter in min end stop
Memorized failure - Parameter in max end stop
Memorized failure - Lines in short circuit
Memorized failure - Bus Off or Mute
Memorized failure - Out of range value
Present and mem failure Open circuit
Present and mem failure Param min end stop
Present and mem failure Parametre in max end stop
Present and mem failure Incoherency Non plausible
Present and mem failure No signal
Present and mem failure Under min threshold
Present and mem failure Upper max threshold
Present and mem failure Permanent low level
Present and mem failure Permanent high level
Present and mem failure Lines in short circuit
Present and mem failure Internal electronic fault
Present and mem failure Bus Off or Mute
Present and mem failure Remote diagnostic
Present and mem failure Disturbed communication
Present and mem failure Abnormal failure
Present and mem failure Out of range value

Present and mem failure reserved bis

Panne presente et memo - Fuite Gradient lent

Present and mem failure Fast grad leakage
Present and mem failure Clutch overheating

Present and mem failure Seen stuck
Present and mem failure Auto-adapt laws failure

Present and mem failure Inoportune Deg (BV)
Present and mem failure Clutch incoherency
Present and mem failure - Incoherency clt pos MS

Data.Description: {\rtf1\ansi\deff0\deftab720{\fonttbl{\f0\fnil MS Sans Serif;}{\f1\fnil\fcharset2 Symbol;}{\f2\fswiss\fprq2 System;}{\f3\fnil\fprq2 MS Sans Serif;}} {\colortbl\red0\green0\blue0;} \deflang1036\pard\plain\f0\fs17 b7-------------------------------------------\tab Valeur standard ou syst\'e8me \par b6---------------------------------------\tab Panne m\'e9moris\'e9e \par b5----------------------------------\tab Panne pr\'e9sente \par \tab b4b3b2b1b0-----------\tab Type de d\'e9faut \par \par \tab b4 b3 b2 b1 b0 \par \par 0\tab 0 0 0 0 0 \tab n.u. \par 1\tab 0 0 0 0 1 \tab CO \par 2\tab 0 0 0 1 0 \tab CC- \par 3\tab 0 0 0 1 1 \tab CC+ \par 4\tab 0 0 1 0 0 \tab Param. en but\'e9e min. \par 5\tab 0 0 1 0 1 \tab Param. en but\'e9e Max. \par 6\tab 0 0 1 1 0 \tab Incoh\'e9rence \par 7\tab 0 0 1 1 1 \tab Pas de signal \par 8\tab 0 1 0 0 0 \tab En dessous du seuil min. \par 9\tab 0 1 0 0 1 \tab Au dessus du seuil Max. \par 10\tab 0 1 0 1 0 \tab Niveau bas permanent \par 11\tab 0 1 0 1 1 \tab Niveau haut permanent \par 12\tab 0 1 1 0 0 \tab Lignes en CC \par 13\tab 0 1 1 0 1 \tab Anomalie \'e9lectronique interne \par \par }

Label.Text: Functionning conditions to respect for each procedure: inf to 400 tr/min

Label.Text: CAN FAILURES CODES: $00 no failure/ $X6 incoherence/ $X7 no signal/ $XE no network/$X0 wrong or invalide received parameter/$6X present blackout CAN failure/$4X memorized blackout CAN failure

Display.DataName: CAN engine value.Info CAN torque consign realisation state.
Info CAN Right front wheel speed.
Info CAN Left front wheel speed.
Info CAN Left back wheel speed.
Info CAN Right back wheel speed.
Info CAN Estimated effective engine torque_

Label.Text: Clutch initial position closed and programming date

Input.RequestName: Init closed position prog date writing
Init closed position prog date writing
Init closed position prog date writing

Screen.Name: Command CSC hydraulic circuit vent procedure

Label.Text: Command CSC hydraulic circuit vent procedure
Functionning conditions to respect for the procedure : gearbox to NEUTRAL, CRANKING ENGINE/no failures on the EV and the master-slave position sensor/TIGHT HANDBRAKE
Initial functionning conditions to respect for the procedure: engine speed<400 tr/min and tight handbrake or push on brake pedal

Display.RequestName: Status of the end stroke selflearning procedure

Label.Text: Preliminary conditions : Gearbox in Neutral, vehicle stopped, engine cranking
System conditions while the service is running : engine cranking, gearbox not in neutral, no failure on EV and clutch position sensor

Display.DataName: Instantaneous derivative of pedal position at 80 ms
Instantaneous derivative of pedal position at 20 ms
